title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fated day of the Japanese Derby has arrived.
Parcae's calculations have yet to bring the
seven-centimeter gap down to zero.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The venue bustles with spectators here to see the
crowning of a Derby champion. While the stands
swell with anticipation and excitement...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The racers waiting on standby are mired in a
thicker than usual blanket of anxiety and tension.
One particular competitor seems especially
agitated.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
E-excuse me... Air Shakur? I'm currently
conducting pre-race interviews and was
wondering if—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Whaddya want?!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: I'm so sorry for bothering you!

text_block_list.name: Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Whoa, Air Shakur certainly seems to be in a mood...

text_block_list.name: Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
Nah, that's just how she always is. You can't really blame
her for being touchy before a major race, though.
choice_data_list: (It's not that. She's just anxious.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite being fated to lose, she still wants to
win... She must be struggling to reconcile the
reality of the situation with her desires.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Quit that.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You've been starin' at me like an idiot for ages,
and it's seriously pissin' me off. If you got
somethin' to say, say it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Tch...
choice_data_list: (There must be something I can do...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She managed to identify the seven-centimeter
gap and also whittle it down to three all on her
own. Is there really anything I can even say to
her?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I believe that if I do what I must, the two of us will
see eye-to-eye one day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Do what I must... As a trainer, I need to assuage
Shakur's nerves so she can take on the race with
confidence.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If people want to take up all the oxygen in the
room makin' noise, then I'll just keep
brainstorming solutions till the very last second.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Just three more centimeters... Just three more measly centimeters... If I can get this down to zero...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Screw it. I'm redoing it from scratch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't have time to second-guess things. If I want
to help her, I have to believe in myself and take
action.
choice_data_list: (There's something I want to say to her.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If I take responsibility for what I tell her and am
prepared to see it through, Air Shakur should be
willing to hear me out.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Dammit! Again with this stupid 991031021222
nonsense! Go away already!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe even you're hell-bent on tickin' me
off, Parcae!
choice_data_list: Shakur!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Finally got the nerve to speak up?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Go ahead, then. I'm all ears. Not like I can't guess
what you're about to say.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You want me to shut up, right? You think I'm
pathetic for getting all worked up like a total
idiot, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I bet you think everything I've done so far has
been for naught and that I should just give up and
accept my fate.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Then again, knowin' you, you might just wanna
say somethin' about how I should enjoy the Derby
since it's a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
We won't know how things'll turn out till it's over
with, and it's gonna start all the same, whether I'm
calm or not, so the only thing to do is run... Blah,
blah, blah.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Come on, what're you so scared to say to me,
huh? Spit it out already.
choice_data_list: It's normal to be scared.
It's normal to be scared.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The partner she has absolute faith in has
predicted that she's destined to lose. Of course
she would feel scared.
choice_data_list: I know that data is everything to you.
I know that data is everything to you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In her world and in the reality she lives, that
forecasted timeline is what will go down in
history. But for me...
choice_data_list:
In my reality, you're the strongest Umamusume
ever!

In my reality, you're the strongest Umamusume
ever!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It hasn't been long since we first met, but I know
the source of her strength stems from all the hard
work she's put in over time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Changing your worldview changes what you see.
I'm not sure my words are enough to convey that,
but I have to try!
choice_data_list:
The person in front of me is someone who can
change her fate.

The person in front of me is someone who can
change her fate.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...
...Is that it?
choice_data_list: Let your tenacity carry you through!
Let your tenacity carry you through!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...
Your logic isn't sound.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you must know something like that would
never convince me.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
So why'd you even bother? You should've let me
be, like always.
choice_data_list: Because I'm quite tenacious as well.
Because I'm quite tenacious as well.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Okay, and?
choice_data_list: I want you to believe in yourself.
I want you to believe in yourself.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
choice_data_list: Break free from all the nightmares.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...I just told you that kinda talk's not going to
work on me.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Siiigh...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Anyway, it's time.
choice_data_list: (I'm sure my words got through.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hmph...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...I get it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Those dreams are over.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I go to put her laptop away after Air Shakur
leaves, and something on the screen catches my
eye.
choice_data_list:
The 991031021222 number isn't there
anymore.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not only that, but Parcae has finished some new
calculations. And the result is...
